title: transport.rs serde_json::to_string uses error-logging, inconsistent with CLAUDE.md §11
description: CLAUDE.md §11 says serde_json::to_string on a derived Serialize cannot fail and the unwrap() calls in ws.rs are intentionally unreachable. transport.rs instead uses match serde_json::to_string(&msg) { Ok(json) => ... Err(e) => error!(...) }. This contradicts the documented convention and implies the serialization CAN fail in this path. A future contributor reading transport.rs will copy the error-logging style; one reading ws.rs will copy the unwrap style. Fix: use .unwrap() with the canonical comment in transport.rs's connection_manager to match ws.rs convention.
